channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [RAG] anything-llm
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.
Language: JavaScript
Category: RAG Stars: 56,390 | Forks: 6,091

item.title: [RAG] llm-app
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1)
Ready-to-run cloud templates for RAG, AI pipelines, and enterprise search with live data. 🐳Docker-friendly.⚡Always in sync with Sharepoint, Google Drive, S3, Kafka, PostgreSQL, real-time data APIs, and more.
Language: Jupyter Notebook
Category: RAG Stars: 57,016 | Forks: 1,387

item.title: [Claude] LocalAI
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
:robot: The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more. Features: Generate Text, MCP, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P and decentralized inference
Language: Go
Category: Claude Stars: 43,821 | Forks: 3,716

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 80,930 → 83,605 (+2,675)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: Claude Stars: 83,605 | Forks: 10,892

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 43,012 → 44,344 (+1,332)
An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms
Language: Python
Category: Claude Stars: 44,344 | Forks: 4,263

item.title: [AI] openclaw
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 318,071 → 321,060 (+2,989)
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
Language: TypeScript
Category: AI Stars: 321,060 | Forks: 61,688
